implementation_notes: The frame wrapper renders up to two explicit candidates per decision so target and context candidate bearings are preserved for the later consistency evidence stage.
Habitat emitted a nonfatal SemanticScene SSD load warning for the HM3D .scn file, but frame export completed with errors=[] and projection gate passed.
Root-owned Docker artifacts are normalized with a --user 0:0 chmod container before and after the wrapper.
verification_commands: docker run --rm --user $(id -u):$(id -g) -e PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 -e PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache -e PYTHONPATH=/workspace/src -v /home/yoohyun/research3:/workspace -w /workspace research3/habitat-h001:20260508-calib-artifacts /opt/conda/bin/python -m py_compile src/h001_runtime/export_postview_frames_v2.py src/h001_runtime/filter_nonblank_frame_summary.py src/h001_runtime/smoke_expanded_retrieval_projection_anchor.py

jq '{ok, rows_requested, rows_exported, rendered_heading_count, min_headings_per_row, max_headings_per_row, uses_gt_for_action}' local_dataset/runs/h001_repeated_object_relation_anchor_consistency_frames_v1/summary.json

jq '{input_rows, output_rows, original_heading_count, kept_heading_count, removed_blank_heading_count, row_gate:.row_level_nonblank_gate_passed, strict_gate:.strict_no_blank_heading_gate_passed, uses_gt_for_action, paper_claim_allowed}' local_dataset/runs/h001_repeated_object_relation_anchor_consistency_frames_v1/nonblank_filter_v1/nonblank_frame_filter_summary.json

jq '{rows, expected_rows, visible_rows:.projection_anchor_visible_rows, visible_rate:.projection_anchor_visible_rate, missing:.missing_candidate_rows, gt:.gt_action_rows, explicit:.candidate_selection_source_counts.explicit_candidate_ids, revision:.frame_revision_metadata_rows, gate:.gate}' local_dataset/runs/h001_repeated_object_relation_anchor_consistency_projection_v1/projection_anchor_smoke_summary.json

interpretation.fact: The repeated-object relation-anchor consistency frame/projection substrate exports all 27 observation rows, keeps all 180 headings after nonblank filtering, and passes projection-anchor smoke with visible rows 27/27.
interpretation.agent_inference: Detector/SAM2 substrate can now run on these frames to test relation-anchor consistency evidence, but terminal ObjectNav utility remains blocked.
interpretation.paper_claim: No paper claim is allowed from this frame/projection smoke alone.
